component.name: Seed Seeker
component.summary: Find promising Shattered Pixel Dungeon seeds

description.p: Seed Seeker is an offline utility for finding and inspecting promising Shattered Pixel Dungeon seeds.

Describe the equipment you are hunting for — items, tiers, upgrade levels, enchantments, sources, and challenges — then search the full seed space on all processor cores with live progress and time-to-match estimates. Scout any seed to browse its complete item manifest floor by floor, with your requirement matches highlighted.
It is an independent, unofficial project and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Shattered Pixel Dungeon or its developers.
Add full native Linux search and scout support.
